task_completion.description: Read the 2025 Cartesian state vectors for the probes
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/probe_ephemeris_2025.txt.

task_completion.description: Create three spacecraft (V1, V2, NH) in GMAT
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing spacecraft named V1, V2, and NH in the Resources tree or script editor, configured with SunMJ2000Eq coordinate system and epoch 01 Jan 2025.

task_completion.description: Configure the Deep Space Force Model
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing a force model configuration with CentralBody = Sun, and PointMasses including Sun, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune.
GMAT GUI showing a Propagate command configured to propagate V1, V2, and NH until 01 Jan 2050 12:00:00.000 UTC or for 9131.25 days.

task_completion.description: Save the GMAT script to the specified location
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing the script saved as interstellar_forecast.script, or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists in ~/Documents/missions/.

task_completion.description: Write the final report with distances and velocities
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of ~/GMAT_output/probe_kinematics_2050.txt containing exactly the required lines for distances, velocities, fastest_probe, and furthest_probe.

integrity.description: Agent actually used GMAT to perform the propagation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GMAT running the simulation, displaying the mission sequence, output reports, or graphical plots, rather than just guessing the values.

integrity.description: The saved GMAT script contains actual mission commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The script editor in GMAT or a text editor showing interstellar_forecast.script should contain valid GMAT syntax for spacecraft creation, force models, and propagation.

integrity.description: Agent did not hallucinate or hardcode the final report
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in probe_kinematics_2050.txt should match the outputs generated by the GMAT run, visible in GMAT's message window or output reports.
